title: pelargonium × graftoniae
intro: Pelargonium × graftoniae, also known as Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant belonging to the Geraniaceae family, resulting from the cross between Pelargonium graveolens and Pelargonium capitatum. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant compounds that help to soothe wounds, reduce pain, and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and mood swings. Rose Geranium is commonly used in herbal preparations, including essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
